r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Growth requires more advertising, better pricing, more salespeople, or better Internet presence

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: The Three Questions Method + Master Mind Business Growth System

headline.primary: Immediately Increase Sales, Immediately Boost Profits, Immediately Improve Your Lifestyle!
headline.subheadline: This business growth system is guaranteed to increase your sales and profits by at least 100% between now and December 31, 2010.
headline.headline_type: Triple benefit promise with specific guarantee

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: IMMEDIATE results AND 100% guarantee - typically contradictory claims unified
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Guaranteed exponential growth within specific timeframe

big_idea.statement: To build your business and double sales/profits by Dec 31, 2010, answer THREE simple questions that unlock hidden wealth in what you already have.
big_idea.supporting_idea: Jay Abraham's three key questions reveal untapped profits everyone misses - leading to 600% increases with no new customers needed.

mechanism.name: The Three Questions Method + Master Mind Business Growth System
mechanism.primary_mechanism: Three diagnostic questions reveal hidden profit opportunities + systematic implementation system

promise.primary_promise: Double your sales and profits by December 31, 2010

strongest_proof_elements.text: PVC pipe client: 600% sales increase in 6 months from answering three questions
Michael Montore: Sales shot up 300%. Paddy Lund (dentist): Profits skyrocketed 300% working fewer hours. Stewart Cruse: Insurance business grew 400%.
$5,000 per hour consultation fee - clients pay because it works
Jim Cook paid Abraham $2 million - reward for building company from $800K to $2 billion (150% increase to $2B!)

proof_inventory.proof_density: Extremely high - testimonials with specific percentages throughout

fssit_candidates.statement: It never fails to amaze me. People come to me wanting to double/triple sales within 6-12 months. I ask three key questions. If on phone, silence. If in person, face goes blank. Without exception, no one knows what I'm talking about.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates that business growth confusion is universal - even smart business owners miss these questions

fssit_candidates.statement: Should you: increase advertising or reduce it? lower prices or sit tight? hire more salespeople or make do with fewer? The correct answer is none of the above!
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why conventional business tactics didn't work - you've been choosing from the WRONG menu of options

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Three simple questions unlock 600% growth - not tactics, strategy, or more resources
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Diagnostic questioning rather than tactical implementation

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: Not your fault growth was slow - you didn't know the RIGHT QUESTIONS to ask
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: All those business books, consultants, tactics that produced incremental results - they didn't address the hidden assets revealed by three questions
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not a struggling business owner, but someone sitting on hidden wealth waiting to be unlocked

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Growth requires more advertising, better pricing, more salespeople, or better Internet presence
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Hidden wealth exists in your current business - three diagnostic questions reveal it
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Previous tactics addressed symptoms (need more customers) rather than revealing hidden assets through strategic questioning

root_cause_architecture.villain: Conventional business tactics and incremental thinking

notable_patterns: Three questions repeatedly mentioned but never revealed
genius_elements: Three questions withheld creates massive curiosity
PVC pipe case study demonstrates 600% growth from Q&A alone
Nine dramatic improvements list previews tangible outcomes
Magic moment concept creates emotional anticipation
Specific deadline makes promise measurable and accountable
